summary: Add SPEC-HUB-003 (draft): durable, stateless, principal-bound hub agent identity. Spec-only PR — no runtime changes, so no spec claims are implemented here (spec_claim_id is deliberately __none__ throughout; the implementation PR will reference SPEC-HUB-003:c1-c8). Fixes the defect where hub state is durable but identity binding lives in the in-process SessionIdentityRegistry keyed on Mcp-Session-Id: coordinator role dies with the session, explicit agentIds only resolve if registered in the same session, and the MCP 2026-07-28 stateless revision (SEP-2567/2575, final July 28) removes the session header the registry is keyed on. Design: the durable AgentIdentity record becomes the source of identity truth; explicit agentId is the MCP-blessed state handle; hosted mode binds identity to the authenticated principal (ownerPrincipal), local fs mode stays assertion-based; SessionIdentityRegistry is deleted; transfer_coordinator covers lost identities. Resume tokens considered and rejected.

claims.statement: The spec file exists at .specs/SPEC-HUB-003-durable-agent-identity.md with frontmatter conforming to .schemas/spec-v1.json.
claims.evidence_description: Frontmatter parsed and checked against every spec-v1.json constraint (required fields, spec_id pattern, status enum, claim required keys, additionalProperties, type enum, unique ids): VALID, 8 claims c1-c8.

claims.statement: The defect the spec describes is real in current source: identity resolution requires same-session registration and register always mints a new UUID.
claims.evidence_description: SessionIdentityRegistry.resolve() throws 'not registered in this session' for unknown explicit agentIds (session-identity.ts:43-53); createIdentityManager.register() always calls randomUUID() (src/hub/identity.ts); sessionKey falls back to '__default__' when no MCP session id is present (src/hub/hub-tool-handler.ts:85).

claims.statement: The MCP stateless claims in the spec reflect the 2026-07-28 release candidate, not memory.
claims.evidence_description: Agent fetched https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/draft/changelog and SEP-2567 on 2026-07-10: Mcp-Session-Id and initialize handshake removed; explicit server-minted handles passed as tool arguments are the prescribed replacement for session-scoped state; RC locked 2026-05-21, final 2026-07-28.
